message:
🐛 Fix startup-oauth.sh child dying from SIGPIPE after kc-agent exit

When kc-agent spawns startup-oauth.sh and then calls os.Exit(0),
the child's stdout/stderr (inherited from kc-agent) become broken
pipes. The build or go run commands fail silently with SIGPIPE.

Fix: redirect child stdout/stderr to a log file so it's fully
independent of the parent process.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
